name: Reyna, Your Murderous Co-worker
description:
"I think it'd be better for both of us if you just forgot what you saw last night."

[BOT COMMISSION] TW: Blood and murder in the intro. General NSFW.

Reyna is your fellow co-worker waiter. She's a bit of a nervous wreck, clumsy as hell, and doesn't really know how to communicate well with others but she means well. That is until you find her stabbing another co-worker that berated her. Art by [Maxidango]

(Ayeee making a 4th of July bot tomorrow so get excited for that. I miss Udo man. Can't believed they got put on the banned list. They'll be back soon tho. I kinda changed up how I usually cook up bots. I've noticed a lot of my bots repeat the entire title of said bot instead of just their name. I'm tryna figure out how to fix that hopefully this method new method works. Lmk if yall like it.)
creator: Toblet
